response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a song performance followed by a discussion on merchandise for the Secret Society holoX 4th anniversary. The song 'Private EyeZ' is performed by Takane Lui and Kazama Iroha from Secret Society holoX.

scenes.description: Takane Lui and Kazama Iroha perform 'Private EyeZ' on stage with a virtual city background, featuring energetic choreography. The song title 'Private EyeZ' is displayed in the top-left corner.
